entry.title: lissy93 contributed to lissy93/domain-locker
entry.content:
lissy93 merged lissy93/domain-locker#106 · June 29, 2026 10:25
refactor: Improved domain lookups #106

Summary

  • Split down into files to make easier to manage
  • Changed fallback: By default, attempts to do domain lookup directly, either whois or rdap. …

10 comments

entry.title: lissy93 commented on pull request lissy93/domain-locker#106
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/domain-locker#106 · June 29, 2026 17:19
lissy93 commented Jun 29, 2026
@copilot undo your commit. I had already comited the fix, and actually mine is better than yours, and I did not give you permission to commit!

[Bug]: Domains no longer updating #102
